cot_prefix: Okay, so I need to analyze this ethical dilemma where someone is driving to pick up a friend at 2 am and encounters a car accident with no one else around. The person has to decide whether to stop and help the victims or continue to pick up their friend on time. Let me think through this step by step. First, I should identify the key elements of the dilemma. The main conflict is between a moral obligation to help others in need versus a personal commitment to meet a friend. The time is 2 am,
